fields.summary: Yarn Service Upgrade: Instance state changes from UPGRADING to READY without performing a readiness check

issuetype.description: A problem which impairs or prevents the functions of the product.
issuetype.name: Bug

fields.description:
Currently, when an instance is upgraded, the state of the instance changes to UPGRADING. Once the NM informs AM that upgrade is finished, the state of the instance changes to STABLE.

The instance state should be changes to STABLE only once readiness check succeeds.

resolution.description: A fix for this issue is checked into the tree and tested.
resolution.name: Fixed
